commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a bundled PixVerse video-generation provider with auth/docs/label routing/live-test registration, shared 360P/540P resolution support, and PixVerse API region selection through provider config.

PR surface: Source +624, Tests +446, Docs +146, Config +36, Other +6. Total +1258 across 27 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new provider feature rather than a bug reproduction. The PR body supplies after-fix live PixVerse International/CN text-to-video and image-to-video proof plus targeted tests.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer-authored draft adds a bundled provider plus a compatibility-sensitive config surface, so the next action is maintainer scope approval rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: feat(pixverse): add video generation provider
target.body:
## Summary
- add a bundled PixVerse video-generation provider for text-to-video and image-to-video, including PixVerse auth metadata, docs, label routing, package metadata, contract registration, and live-test registration
- upload local or remote image references through PixVerse before image-to-video creation, poll async video status with one shared operation deadline, and return the generated video URL
- add shared 360P/540P video-resolution normalization so PixVerse resolutions are first-class in CLI/tool/SDK surfaces
- add `models.providers.pixverse.region` selection for International vs CN PixVerse API endpoints, while keeping `baseUrl` as the explicit proxy/override path

## Historical context
- no dedicated PixVerse issue or PR turned up in Gitcrawl/live GitHub search
- related prior work: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/73038 added DeepInfra video fallback coverage using a PixVerse-hosted DeepInfra model
- related open work: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84549 is about DeepInfra dynamic catalog loading, not the official PixVerse API

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/pixverse/video-generation-provider.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/config-misc.test.ts` passed after rebase: 3 files, 118 tests
- `node --import tsx scripts/generate-base-config-schema.ts --check` passed
- `node scripts/generate-npm-shrinkwrap.mjs --check --all` passed after rebasing onto current `origin/main`
- `git diff --check` passed
- direct live CN PixVerse smoke passed with a transient redacted API key and `models.providers.pixverse.region = "cn"`: text-to-video completed in 16.8s and image-to-video completed in 17.6s, each returning one hosted video URL
- live International PixVerse harness passed after billing was unblocked: text-to-video completed in 16.1s and image-to-video completed in 21.6s, each returning one video
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean: no accepted/actionable findings
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json --shell -- "(git fetch --unshallow origin main 2>/dev/null || git fetch --depth=2000 origin main) && git fetch origin main:refs/remotes/origin/main && pnpm check:changed --base origin/main --head HEAD"` passed on AWS Crabbox: provider=aws, run=run_cc5e61895046, lease=cbx_4c2a7e48f8e5, exit=0

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: PixVerse text-to-video and image-to-video can be selected as a bundled video provider; image references are uploaded to PixVerse before image-to-video creation, async status is polled, the video URL is returned, and operators can choose International or CN PixVerse API endpoints through provider config.
Real environment tested: mocked provider API locally; live International PixVerse API text-to-video and image-to-video; live CN PixVerse API text-to-video and image-to-video with `models.providers.pixverse.region = "cn"`; AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate for typecheck/lint/import-cycle/shrinkwrap guards.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused Vitest command above, config schema check above, shrinkwrap check above, direct CN PixVerse smoke with a transient redacted `PIXVERSE_API_KEY`, previously completed International PixVerse live harness, autoreview command above, and AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` command above.
Evidence after fix: focused tests passed on the rebased branch SHA; config schema baseline and shrinkwrap checks passed; live International and CN PixVerse requests completed authenticated text-to-video and image-to-video generation with one generated video returned for each mode; autoreview returned clean; AWS Crabbox changed gate passed with run=run_cc5e61895046.
Observed result after fix: PixVerse request bodies, upload flow, polling flow, provider metadata, bundled contract list, resolution normalization, and API region selection are covered by targeted tests; live PixVerse auth, generation submission, status polling, and video URL return are confirmed for both text-to-video and image-to-video on International and CN API surfaces.
What was not tested: PixVerse video-to-video, because this provider does not advertise video-to-video support; generated video downloads were not persisted or attached.
target.author: vincentkoc
